6:
WITH cust_2013 AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_cons AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(total_cons) AS min_total
    FROM cust_2013
    GROUP BY Segment
),
lowest AS (
    SELECT c2013.Segment, c2013.CustomerID, c2013.total_cons
    FROM cust_2013 c2013
    JOIN min_cons m ON c2013.Segment = m.Segment AND c2013.total_cons = m.min_total
),
seg_avg AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           SUM(total_cons) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS avg_cons
    FROM lowest
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT
    (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM seg_avg
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH seg_year AS (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS yr,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
),
pivot AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        MAX(CASE WHEN yr = '2012' THEN total_cons END) AS cons_2012,
        MAX(CASE WHEN yr = '2013' THEN total_cons END) AS cons_2013
    FROM seg_year
    GROUP BY Segment
),
pct AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2013) AS PercentageIncrease
    FROM pivot
    WHERE cons_2013 IS NOT NULL AND cons_2012 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT Segment, PercentageIncrease
FROM pct
ORDER BY PercentageIncrease DESC
LIMIT 1

UNION ALL

SELECT Segment, PercentageIncrease
FROM pct
ORDER BY PercentageIncrease ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN l.`T-CHO` END) AS nov_sum,
        SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN l.`T-CHO` END) AS dec_sum

    l.driverId,
    (CAST(SUBSTR(l.time,1,INSTR(l.time,':')-1) AS INTEGER)*60*1000
